summary:
All tests passed. 

**The needle:** In `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`, the `proxy_pass` directive was pointing to port `5001` instead of port `5000`. The Flask backend (`server.py`) listens on port `5000`, so the nginx upstream proxy port was mismatched, causing `/api/data` requests to fail while `/health` still worked (because the health endpoint was served directly by nginx with a static `return 200` response, bypassing the upstream entirely).

**The fix:** Changed `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` → `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;`
